title: Security: [ANGLE] Out-of-bound write in rx::Image11::GenerateMipmap
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
There is a out-of-bound write bug in the ANGLE d3d11 renderer that is caused by the Image11::redefine function when generateMipmap function is called with 3D textures.  
  
ANGLE uses the TextureD3D_3D::redefineImage function when setting the properties of a 3D texture i
